zh.lifeSummary: 當Randulph De Praers於1200年出生在英國英格蘭爾巴堂姆利時，他的父親Roger de Praers31歲，母親Evelyn de Riandeau37歲。他於1194年與Amiceia de Galtha在英國爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1300年2月1日在英國英格蘭艾可希布爾 丁加姆享年100歲。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Randulph
meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

en.lifeSummary: When Randulph De Praers was born in 1200, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Praers, was 31 and his mother, Evelyn de Riandeau, was 37. He married Amiceia de Galtha in 1194, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 1 February 1300, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randulph De Praers est né en 1200, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Praers, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Evelyn de Riandeau, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Amiceia de Galtha en 1194, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 1 février 1300, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 100 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Randulph De Praersが1200年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーで生まれた時，父Roger de Praersは31歳，母Evelyn de Riandeauは37歳であった。1194年にイギリスチェシュアイアでAmiceia de Galthaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1300年2月1日にイギリスイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Randulph De Praers(이)가 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 바톰리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Praers(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Evelyn de Riandeau(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1194년 영국 체실르에서 Amiceia de Galtha(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1300년 2월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randulph De Praers родился в 1200 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Praers было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Evelyn de Riandeau, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Amiceia de Galtha в 1194 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 1 февраля 1300 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 100 лет.
